topics.title: Community Engagement in Technology
topics.summary: Recent discussions at localfirstconf.com highlight the importance of community in technology development. Talks by @willow.sh and @patak.cat emphasize how community-driven initiatives can enhance user experience and foster collaboration within the npm ecosystem.

topics.title: npmx: A Community-Built Browser
topics.summary: The talk by @willow.sh and @patak.cat at localfirstconf.com introduced 'npmx', a fast community-built browser for the npm registry. This initiative aims to streamline access to npm packages, showcasing the potential of community contributions in software development.

topics.title: Celebrating Community Milestones
topics.summary: The localfirstconf.com event not only focused on technology but also celebrated personal milestones, such as Willow's birthday. This blend of professional and personal recognition fosters a sense of belonging and community spirit among attendees.
